title: aspidosperma riedelii
intro: Aspidosperma riedelii, also known as Riedel's tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloid content, which includes the anti-cancer compound vinblastine. The health benefits of Aspidosperma riedelii include its potential to inhibit the growth of cancer cells, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, where it is typically consumed as a tea or used in tincture form to harness its therapeutic benefits.
